data.body:
Epic complete: all 5 stories closed, all tasks closed. 12 batches executed.
- ticket transition close: 1 batch scan (down from 2)
- ticket-graph.py: 1 reduce_all_tickets call per invocation (down from 2-3)
- All scan operations exclude archived by default
- --include-archived flag on ticket list and ticket deps
- ticket_find_open_children eliminated (2n→1 process spawn)
- Close benchmark: 0.44s with 64 tickets (well under 10s target)
- Docs updated
